Decision: Build an attribution instrument that can also compete.
Rationale: Primary value is learning where forecast edge comes from; tournament supplies external feedback.

Decision: Use MiniBench/current successor as initial venue.
Rationale: Fast feedback and manageable question windows.

Decision: Use forecasting-tools wherever it supports the workflow.
Rationale: Maintained API/question/CDF glue lowers integration risk.
Revisit Trigger: Package blocks attribution or safe submission.

Decision: Freeze attribution schema before first submission.
Rationale: Prevents missing pre-resolution data and hindsight contamination.

Decision: Use one strong forecaster model plus retrieval in v1.
Rationale: Creates an interpretable baseline.
Revisit Trigger: After reliable baseline and enough paired questions.

Decision: Do not build the nine-agent Council in v1.
Rationale: Complexity would obscure attribution and delay first submission.

Decision: Reserve multi-agent forecasting for a later A/B test.
Rationale: Paired identical questions can measure incremental value.

Decision: Do not build continuous Market Pulse updates in v1.
Rationale: Different operational problem and cadence.

Decision: Do not integrate PaperPolyMkt.
Rationale: Unrelated to first venue and attribution milestone.

Decision: Do not architect around local inference.
Rationale: Local machine is for orchestration/storage, not competitive inference.

Decision: Keep model, retrieval, tournament and calibration configurable.
Rationale: All are moving external dependencies.

Decision: Keep human review before initial submissions.
Rationale: Protects live venue and supports learning/debugging.
Revisit Trigger: After audited safe batch history and explicit owner decision.

Decision: Prefer a small observable pipeline.
Rationale: Fastest route to a trustworthy end-to-end record.

Decision: Public repository under mcleblanc711.
Rationale: Project is intended as a reusable public learning artifact.
Revisit Trigger: Secrets/licensing issue makes public release unsafe.

Decision: ChatGPT Work researches/specifies; Claude Code may implement; Codex reviews; owner merges.
Rationale: Clear division of labour and human merge authority.

Decision: Use SQLite as v1 source of truth.
Rationale: Transactions, uniqueness and local querying beat JSONL for lifecycle/version data without adding infrastructure.

Decision: Use AskNews as primary retrieval.
Rationale: News-specialized, article timestamps/citations, package integration and FutureEval precedent.
Revisit Trigger: Pilot shows poor coverage/cost or credentials unavailable.

Decision: Use Exa as one fallback.
Rationale: Package familiarity, broad web/official-source retrieval and simple pricing.
Revisit Trigger: Fallback quality or availability fails pilot.

Decision: Bypass general retrieval for authoritative structured sources.
Rationale: Direct data reduces transcription errors and improves reproducibility.
Revisit Trigger: Source has no stable API/file access.

Decision: Support binary, multiple-choice and numeric in v1.
Rationale: Covers verified active types and foreseeable current venue formats.
Revisit Trigger: Authenticated fetch proves a required unsupported type.

Decision: Defer date and conditional questions.
Rationale: Not required by current Summer template and adds validation complexity.

Decision: Log community prediction after forecasting; do not use it as v1 model input.
Rationale: Preserves an independent baseline while enabling later comparison.
Alternatives Considered: Give CP to model; omit CP entirely

Decision: Make submission a separate approved command with idempotency.
Rationale: Clear safety boundary and duplicate-post protection.

Decision: Store concise rationale summaries, not hidden chain-of-thought.
Rationale: Attribution needs auditable factors, not unrestricted internal traces.
Revisit Trigger: Never without a specific compliant research need.

Decision: Append forecast versions and lifecycle events; never overwrite history.
Rationale: Resolution analysis requires exact pre-resolution state.

Decision: Pin forecasting-tools 0.2.92 for v1.
Rationale: Verified current interface; beta package can change.

Decision: Require explicit model name; provide no silent model default.
Rationale: Provider availability and frontier rankings move faster than code.
Revisit Trigger: Owner deliberately pins a stable default.

Decision: Use package post methods plus refetch verification first; spike exact response capture.
Rationale: Uses maintained path while addressing receipt gap with a narrow seam.
Alternatives Considered: Private method; raw API from day one

Decision: Treat JSONL/Parquet as derived exports.
Rationale: Supports audit and polygraph analysis without multiple sources of truth.
Revisit Trigger: External consumer requires another canonical format.

Decision: Ingest platform numeric scores before implementing a local replica.
Rationale: Avoids mislabelling a proxy metric as Metaculus continuous log score.
Revisit Trigger: Official formula/API is fully verified and tested.

Decision: Keep current tournament IDs in config and verify SDK aliases at runtime.
Rationale: MiniBench slug rotates semantically even when string stays stable; seasonal numeric ID changes.
